title: Haunted Alpha
description: Try to survive in alpha-styled minecraft with "them" haunting you.
body:
# Small description

You have to survive in alpha-styled minecraft with something or someone haunting you down.

## What does this modpack add?

1. Entity that haunts you - spoiler: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Herobrines

</details>

2. Seasons as addition to alpha minecraft

3. Minimap and world Map

4. Tweaks that change minecraft to look and feel older!

5. Resourse Pack that makes minecraft look like Alpha versions.
